case_title: RIMMA ZLATINA ET AL VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-22-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-01-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIP TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF RIMMA ZLATINA WAS PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF LEONID ZLATIN WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY RUSSIAN INTERPRETER MARIA ENTCHEVITCH. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FORSBLAD. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-01-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-01-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY CROSS-COMPLAINANT'S REPRESENTATIVE MARLEENA GREEN, CLAIMS ADJUSTER FOR THE CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, AND CROSS-DEFENDANTS RIMMA ZLATINA & LEONID ZLATINA. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE AS TO CROSS-DEFENDANT LEONID ZLATINA, BUT NO PROOF OF SERVICE AS TO CROSS-DEFENDANT RIMMA ZLATINA, WHO WAIVES SERVICE OF THE CROSS-CLAIM AT TODAY'S HEARING. COURT CERTIFIED RUSSIAN SPEAKING INTERPRETER LUBA CHERNOV ASSISTED MR. ZLATINA AT THE HEARING. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO PLAINTIFF ZLATIN, LEONID

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-22-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-01-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIP TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF RIMMA ZLATINA WAS PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF LEONID ZLATIN WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY RUSSIAN INTERPRETER MARIA ENTCHEVITCH. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FORSBLAD. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-01-2016 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ZLATINA, RIMMA ZLATIN, LEONID
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO FEE FOR SERVICE SERVED MAY-31-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ZLATINA, RIMMA ZLATIN, LEONID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-22-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-01-2016 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,900.00 FILED BY ZLATINA, RIMMA ZLATIN, LEONID AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-22-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-01-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-01-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFFS RIMMA ZLATINA & LEONID ZLATINA, AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE MARLEENA GREEN, CLAIMS ADJUSTER FOR THE CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. COURT CERTIFIED RUSSIAN SPEAKING INTERPRETER LUBA CHERNOV ASSISTED MR. ZLATINA AT TODAY'S HEARING. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZLATINA, RIMMA ZLATIN, LEONID IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
RETURNED MAIL: DEFENDANT'S CLAIM MAILED CERTIFIED TO RIMMA ZLATINA RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED, UNABLE TO FORWARD.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO PLAINTIFF ZLATINA, RIMMA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED JUN-09-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ZLATIN, LEONID

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT ZLATINA, RIMMA ZLATIN, LEONID $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
